---
title: "Embedded Camera Acquisition"
description: "A technology demonstrator for camera streaming, device control and high-resolution snapshot capture."
canonical-url: "https://optolab-unimore.github.io/projects/items/embedded-camera.html"
date: 2026-01-01
categories: [Technology demonstrator, Embedded systems, Imaging]
---

::: {.status-pill}
Demonstrative content — replace before institutional release
:::

## Research context

Embedded cameras provide a compact platform for exploring how sensor configuration, memory, image compression and transfer protocols affect an acquisition chain.

## Demonstrator scope

This demonstrator links ESP32-S3 firmware with a PySide6 desktop interface over a readable TCP protocol. The public educational resource supports live JPEG streaming, JSON control commands and still-image capture.

## Related public resource

See [esp32-s3-camera-gui](https://github.com/OPTOLAB-UNIMORE/esp32-s3-camera-gui) for the verified public description, source code and teaching notes.
